question: Sofia has 13 stickers, while Tara has 7 more than Sofia. Earlier, Silas had sorted sixty-seven buttons into a drawer. How many stickers does Tara have?
Zoe earns five dollars an hour and works 4 hours a week for six weeks, then buys a kite for ninety-two dollars. Anya also counted 76 peaches yesterday. How many dollars does Zoe have left?

Ruby has 55 pencils and Ethan has 29 pencils. Later, Ruby is given another 24. Then Ruby passes 3 along to Ethan. Ruby donates 36. A lucky trade doubles Ruby's pile. How many pencils do they have altogether now?
Leo's lawn measures twenty-two meters by 15 meters. Ethan also counted 51 muffins yesterday. How many square meters is its area?
Caleb has 38 shells, and Ethan has half as many again as Caleb. How many more shells does Ethan have than Caleb?
Tiles cost 5 dollars per square meter, and Olivia wants to tile a four by 10 meter field. Tara also counted 13 cookies yesterday. How many dollars will the tiles cost?
For 2 weeks and 2 days straight, Owen does 13 push-ups a day. Meanwhile Nina brought 6 eggs to school. How many push-ups is that in all?
Mason has fifty-five ribbons. Mason finds three more. They drop five. Mason is given 19 more. It took longer than expected. How many ribbons does Mason have now?

Ruby has 43 stickers and Ava has 53 stickers. Ruby sells fourteen. Ava then doubles their pile. Ruby sells sixteen. Ava sells 17. They lose fifty-one. (Felix once collected seventy-three eggs, but that was last year.) How many more stickers does Ava have than Ruby now?
Edie empties a piggy bank and finds 10 nickels, 8 quarters and 6 pennies. How many cents is that in total?
A hall has 9 racks with 8 jackets on each. Thirteen jackets get sold. Ruby also counted 33 peaches yesterday. How many jackets remain?
Mason writes 6 postcards every day for two weeks and 4 days. (Olivia once collected forty acorns, but that was last year.) How many postcards is that in all?
Omar buys 4 candles at seven dollars each. How many dollars does Omar spend in total?
Silas has sixteen shells and Ravi has 20 shells. Silas gives away 6. Ravi wins 16 more. Silas gives 6 to Ravi. Ravi hands Silas 20 of them. How many shells does Ravi have now?
At the market, Zoe picks up 5 keychains at three dollars each and five notebooks at 6 dollars each. How many dollars does Zoe spend in total?
Silas buys 4 kites for eight dollars apiece and 2 notebooks at 3 dollars each. Meanwhile Mia brought 23 seashells to school. How many dollars does Silas spend in total?
The store cuts the sixty-eight dollar cap by 25 percent. Edie also counted 10 cookies yesterday. What does it cost now in dollars?
A crate holds green and blue cans in a ratio of 3 green to every 2 blue. Exactly 15 of them are green. Owen also counted 31 bottles yesterday. How many blue cans are there?
In a crate of eggs, there are 3 yellow ones for every four green ones. There are forty green eggs. Zoe also counted 54 eggs yesterday. How many eggs are in the crate altogether?

Caleb has forty-eight shells and Sofia has 30 shells. Sofia gives away 11. Caleb gives 31 to Sofia. Then Caleb passes 8 along to Sofia. Caleb sells six. A lucky trade doubles Caleb's pile. Meanwhile Leo brought thirty-five buttons to school. How many more shells does Sofia have than Caleb now?
After spending 32 of ninety-six dollars, Mason divides what is left evenly between 4 cousins. Meanwhile Anya brought sixty-nine pins to school. How many dollars does each cousin receive?
A book has 224 pages, and Zoe gets through 27 a day. A neighbor, Silas, keeps sixty-seven peaches at home. How many days does Zoe need to finish it?
Zoe empties a piggy bank and finds 5 pennies and 3 nickels. Ruby also counted 6 stickers yesterday. How many cents is that in total?
Hugo folds 7 paper cranes every day for 2 weeks and four days. The weather was perfect that day. How many paper cranes is that in all?
Omar empties a piggy bank and finds 10 quarters and 10 nickels. Omar spends 110 cents on a sticker. Noah also counted sixty-six marbles yesterday. How many cents does Omar have left?

Emma has 32 paper cranes and Edie has thirty-seven paper cranes. Emma wins 13 more. Later, Edie wins another seven. Edie misplaces 27. Edie donates 15. Emma picks up 20 more. Meanwhile Mason brought 14 bricks to school. It took longer than expected. How many paper cranes does Edie end up with?
June bakes 3 trays of fifteen cookies. One cookies get eaten warm. The rest are boxed equally into four boxes. Nobody kept track of the time. How many cookies go into each box?
Liam has thirty marbles and Olivia has 35 marbles. Olivia wins 21 more. Liam then doubles their pile. Liam drops 29. It was a busy afternoon. How many marbles does Liam end up with?
A playground is 14 meters long and 14 meters wide. How many square meters is its area?
In a coat pocket, Emma discovers 6 dimes, 5 pennies and 11 nickels. (June once collected 28 trading cards, but that was last year.) How many cents is that in total?
For three weeks and four days straight, Silas writes 10 postcards a day. (Caleb once collected 8 paper cranes, but that was last year.) How many postcards is that in all?

Mia empties a piggy bank and finds 2 quarters, 5 dimes and 2 nickels. Mia spends 30 cents on a sticker. A neighbor, Olivia, keeps 26 beads at home. Everyone was excited. How many cents does Mia have left?

At the market, Isla picks up four posters for twelve dollars apiece and a pen for 12 dollars. Earlier, Anya had sorted 12 apples into a drawer. Nobody kept track of the time. How many dollars does Isla spend in total?

A boat travels five hours at fifty-five miles per hour, then three hours at 70 miles per hour, then 1 hour at 53 miles per hour. Earlier, Priya had sorted eighteen muffins into a drawer. How many miles is that in total?
Emma empties a piggy bank and finds 8 nickels and 6 quarters. How many cents is that in total?
In a coat pocket, Noah discovers eleven nickels and seven dimes. Noah spends 70 cents on a sticker. Meanwhile Zoe brought seventy-two cookies to school. How many cents does Noah have left?
A basket holds ten muffins; half of them are blue, the others white. A neighbor, Ethan, keeps 78 bottles at home. The weather was perfect that day. How many muffins are white?
A crate holds spotted and white peaches in a ratio of two spotted to every three white. Exactly eight of them are spotted. How many peaches are in the crate altogether?
In a coat pocket, Diego discovers 8 dimes and 11 pennies. How many cents is that in total?

Ravi has 36 paper cranes and Edie has 25 paper cranes. Later, Edie earns another 9. Then Edie passes five along to Ravi. They then double their pile. They lose thirty-nine. In total, how many paper cranes do they have at the end?
Of 15 apples in a basket, a third are white and the rest are red. Meanwhile Ravi brought 68 tokens to school. How many apples are red?
A rectangular lawn is four meters by 16 meters. A neighbor, Olivia, keeps 41 bottles at home. How many meters of edging go all the way around it?
Liam must pack 249 bottles into bags of 15. (Edie once collected 69 seashells, but that was last year.) Nobody kept track of the time. How many bags does that take?
Mason has 24 shells, Ethan has 27 shells and Silas has 39 shells. Ethan finds 15 more. A lucky trade doubles Silas's pile. How many shells does Ethan end up with?
Felix reads a dozen pages of a 146 page book each day. Meanwhile Caleb brought fifty-six stamps to school. How many days does Felix need to finish it?
Each box holds 27 oranges. A store needs to pack 391 oranges. Earlier, Silas had sorted 42 buttons into a drawer. How many boxs does that take?
After spending eleven of 41 dollars, Sofia divides what is left evenly between 3 cousins. The weather was perfect that day. How many dollars does each cousin receive?
Mason has 124 dollars, spends 29 on lunch, and splits the rest equally among 5 cousins. How many dollars does each cousin receive?
For two weeks and 4 days straight, Ava folds 5 paper cranes a day. Nobody kept track of the time. How many paper cranes is that in all?
Isla has sixteen shells, while Zoe has two fewer than Isla. Meanwhile Liam brought 35 stamps to school. It took longer than expected. How many do the two of them have altogether?
The store cuts the 60 dollar keychain by 20 percent. Silas also counted forty-one shells yesterday. The weather was perfect that day. What does it cost now in dollars?
Tiles cost three dollars per square meter, and Nina wants to tile a 15 by fourteen meter courtyard. How many dollars will the tiles cost?
Leo has 23 erasers, Mia has 22 erasers and June has 12 erasers. Mia misplaces 9. Mia hands June 2 of them. Mia picks up 16 more. How many erasers do they have altogether now?
Tara deals 24 pencils out evenly to 4 classmates. Omar also counted 76 pins yesterday. How many does each classmate get?
A rectangular garden is 11 meters by 5 meters. How many meters of edging go all the way around it?
Anya has 29 beads and Emma has fifty-two beads. Anya gives 22 to Emma. Emma sells twelve. Felix also counted 51 trading cards yesterday. How many beads do they have altogether now?
Mason has eleven erasers. Nina has 8 short of double that. A neighbor, Caleb, keeps 44 paper cranes at home. It took longer than expected. How many more erasers does Nina have than Mason?

Ethan has thirty-four beads and Wren has 42 beads. Ethan loses 4. Later, Wren wins another 9. Later, Ethan picks up another 15. Wren loses all but three of them. Later, Wren finds another three. A neighbor, Zoe, keeps 64 jars at home. How many more beads does Ethan have than Wren now?
Leo buys 6 mugs for six dollars apiece. Leo only has 18 dollars. How many more dollars does Leo need?
A cyclist makes a trip of 1 hour at 67 miles per hour, then 5 hours at 32 miles per hour, and finally returns exactly the way it came. It was a busy afternoon. How many miles is that in total?
For 1 week and one day straight, Isla plants 3 seedlings a day. How many seedlings is that in all?
In a coat pocket, Diego discovers 7 nickels and ten pennies. How many cents is that in total?
Emma writes three postcards every day for 3 weeks and 3 days. Earlier, Diego had sorted 37 acorns into a drawer. How many postcards is that in all?
A keychain priced at 30 dollars is marked down 50 percent. Meanwhile Olivia brought 54 trading cards to school. What does it cost now in dollars?

Mason has 23 pencils. Later, Mason collects another twenty-two. Mason misplaces 33. Later, Mason wins another seventeen. Meanwhile Emma brought 42 cans to school. Everyone was excited. How many pencils does Mason end up with?
Leo buys 6 plants for 13 dollars apiece and 6 notebooks at 10 dollars each. Earlier, Priya had sorted forty-three marbles into a drawer. How many dollars does Leo spend in total?
Ava has 8 stickers, while June has 9 more than Ava. (Mia once collected 20 acorns, but that was last year.) How many stickers do they have in total?
Mia has 86 dollars, spends 26 on lunch, and splits the rest equally among 5 cousins. How many dollars does each cousin receive?

On the journey, a train covers 5 hours at 17 miles per hour, then 1 hour at forty-seven miles per hour, then 2 hours at twenty-five miles per hour. A neighbor, June, keeps two erasers at home. How many miles is that in total?
Ethan plants fourteen seedlings every day for two weeks and three days. Meanwhile Ava brought 45 cookies to school. How many seedlings is that in all?
A crate holds red and yellow peaches in a ratio of 2 red to every 4 yellow. Exactly 8 of them are red. How many peaches are in the crate altogether?
For 4 weeks and 2 days straight, Owen walks three blocks a day. How many blocks is that in all?
In a coat pocket, Mason discovers five pennies and 6 nickels. Mason spends 5 cents on a sticker. How many cents does Mason have left?
In a crate of oranges, there are five green ones for every four yellow ones. There are 36 yellow oranges. It was a busy afternoon. How many oranges are in the crate altogether?
The 180 dollar kite gets 10 percent more expensive. June also counted 31 bottle caps yesterday. Nobody kept track of the time. What is the new price in dollars?
A basket holds fifty-two bricks; a quarter of them are striped, the others green. Mason also counted sixty-four shells yesterday. How many bricks are green?
A crate holds red and spotted cookies in a ratio of two red to every 5 spotted. Exactly 10 of them are red. How many spotted cookies are there?
Silas empties a piggy bank and finds 10 dimes and 6 quarters. Meanwhile Anya brought 77 pencils to school. How many cents is that in total?
Felix must pack 175 oranges into boxs of ten. Earlier, Silas had sorted seventy-seven beads into a drawer. How many boxs does that take?
June walks 9 blocks every day for 1 week and 1 day. How many blocks is that in all?
Lucas writes 12 postcards every day for 4 weeks and 3 days. Meanwhile Owen brought 58 oranges to school. How many postcards is that in all?
In a crate of jars, there are 4 green ones for every 5 yellow ones. There are 25 yellow jars. A neighbor, Leo, keeps 68 cookies at home. How many green jars are there?
A boat travels five hours at 24 miles per hour, then 3 hours at 59 miles per hour. Earlier, Ava had sorted sixty-four cans into a drawer. How many miles is that in total?
Lucas folds 13 paper cranes every day for 1 week and one day. A neighbor, Felix, keeps nine pins at home. How many paper cranes is that in all?

Nina has 20 tokens and Liam has 36 tokens. Then Nina passes 12 along to Liam. Liam gives half of them away. Liam loses all but 5 of them. Liam hands Nina 2 of them. Nina drops 6. Nobody kept track of the time. How many tokens does Nina have now?
Hugo buys 4 caps at ten dollars each and three plants at 6 dollars each. Hugo only has 56 dollars. Meanwhile Sofia brought fifty-seven stamps to school. How many more dollars does Hugo need?
A crate holds yellow and red muffins in a ratio of 3 yellow to every four red. Exactly thirty of them are yellow. A neighbor, Caleb, keeps thirty-six pencils at home. How many red muffins are there?
In a coat pocket, Olivia discovers 4 nickels, eleven pennies and 3 dimes. Liam also counted 33 shells yesterday. How many cents is that in total?
A basket holds 20 peaches; a fifth of them are yellow, the others white. Leo also counted 7 seashells yesterday. It was a busy afternoon. How many peaches are white?

Ruby has forty-eight ribbons and Noah has 59 ribbons. Noah loses all but 6 of them. Later, Ruby wins another 20. They misplace thirty-two. Ruby hands Noah 8 of them. They collect 9 more. How many more ribbons does Ruby have than Noah now?
At the market, Mia picks up five candles for 6 dollars apiece and 6 pens for 5 dollars apiece. Mia pays with a 100 dollar bill. The weather was perfect that day. How much change does Mia get back?
Sofia's lawn measures seven meters by 10 meters. How many square meters is its area?
At the market, Isla picks up 5 puzzles at a dozen dollars each and 4 keychains for seven dollars apiece. The weather was perfect that day. How many dollars does Isla spend in total?

At the market, Ravi picks up 5 mugs at 3 dollars each, 2 posters at twelve dollars each and 2 kites for 14 dollars apiece. Leo also counted 46 bottle caps yesterday. Nobody kept track of the time. How many dollars does Ravi spend in total?
In a crate of oranges, there are 4 green ones for every 5 spotted ones. There are 40 spotted oranges. How many oranges are in the crate altogether?
Ruby deals 76 bottle caps out evenly to six classmates. Meanwhile Liam brought 5 pencils to school. How many does each classmate get?
Isla buys one candle priced at 10 dollars and a cap for 7 dollars. How many dollars does Isla spend in total?
On the journey, a truck covers 1 hour at 20 miles per hour, then 1 hour at 67 miles per hour. Earlier, June had sorted 17 peaches into a drawer. How many miles is that in total?
In a coat pocket, Sofia discovers 6 pennies and 9 dimes. Meanwhile Diego brought 22 cookies to school. How many cents is that in total?
The 140 dollar notebook gets 10 percent more expensive. Liam also counted 23 marbles yesterday. What is the new price in dollars?
